spec.description: Dashboard for Spring Boot2 Statistics(by micrometer-prometheus).

spec.expr: irate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{instance="$instance", application="$application", exception="None", uri!~".*actuator.*"}[5m]) / irate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{instance="$instance", application="$application", exception="None", uri!~".*actuator.*"}[5m])

spec.title: Mercadox Statics
